title: lithocarpus vuquangensis
intro: Lithocarpus vuquangensis, also known as Vu Quang's Lithocarpus, is a species of evergreen tree in the beech family, Fagaceae. This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lithocarpus vuquangensis include its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. Lithocarpus vuquangensis is typically prepared as a decoction or infusion, and can be consumed as a tea or used as a topical treatment for skin conditions.
